D0150A2_LTTL_INTRST_FREQ_CD Mood: Little interest/pleasure doing things: Freq Indicates the frequency, over the last 2 weeks, the patient has had little interest or pleasure in doing things. 0. Never or 1 day 
1. 2-6 days (several days) 
2. 7-11 days (half or more of the days) 
3. 12-14 days (nearly every day) CHAR 1 x
